when.test: COMPANY_TYPE_S != "" and COMPANY_TYPE_S != null and COMPANY_TYPE_S == "S"

choose.when: SELECT '1' AS RELAT_YN , VENDOR_CD AS CUST_CD , VENDOR_NM AS CUST_NM , IRS_NO AS IRS_NUM , BUSINESS_TYPE , INDUSTRY_TYPE FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PROGRESS_CD = 'E' AND (BLOCK_FLAG IS NULL OR BLOCK_FLAG = '0') AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

mapper.select: SELECT BACP.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , BACP.CTRL_CD , BACP.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM , BACP.USE_FLAG , NULL AS DEPT_NM , BACP.MOD_DATE AS US_MOD_INFO ,GETUSERNAME(BACP.GATE_CD, BACP.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS US_MOD_USER_NM FROM STOCBACP BACP WHERE BACP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BACP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD_S} AND BACP.CTRL_CD = #{CTRL_CD_S} AND BACP.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCCVUR SET MNG_YN = (CASE WHEN (#{DEL_FLAG}, '0') = '1' THEN '0' ELSE (CASE WHEN (#{USE_FLAG},'0') = '1' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) END) WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID = (CASE WHEN (#{CTRL_USER_ID},'X') = 'X' THEN #{CTRL_USER_ID_ORI} ELSE #{CTRL_USER_ID} END) AND USER_TYPE = 'B' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
